_comment: Fixed test fixture for cross-language verification. Python crypto.py in services/tee/haggle_tee/crypto.py MUST be able to decrypt this envelope using teeSk and recover plaintext. Derivation: X25519(ephSk, teePk) -> HKDF-SHA256(salt=ephPub||teePk, info='haggle-v1') -> XChaCha20-Poly1305(key, nonce, aad=listingId||offerId). See PLAN §3.5 and packages/crypto/test/roundtrip.test.ts.
